Point¶

class Point.point(x, y, name='')[source]¶

Represents a point in 2D space with optional name.

get_boylam()[source]¶

Returns the longitude (boylam) of the point.

Returns:

Longitude value

Return type:

float

get_enlem()[source]¶

Returns the latitude (enlem) of the point.

Returns:

Latitude value

Return type:

float
